## Summary

Provide a short description of the change and why it was made.

## Related issues

- Fixes: # (issue number)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran the test suite and all tests pass (`npm test`).
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:connection` if this change touches Supabase/DB.
- [ ] I updated or added unit/integration tests as appropriate.
- [ ] I updated documentation or added notes in the PR description for required env vars.
- [ ] Changes are scoped and do not touch unrelated files.

## How to validate

1. Steps to reproduce the change locally.
2. Commands to run and expected output.

## Agent helpers

This repository includes Copilot agents, prompts, and a workspace skill to help with tests, refactors, and Supabase checks.

- See [.github/README.md](.github/README.md) for invocation examples.
- If you used an agent to prepare this PR, list which agent/prompt you used and what it did.
